The '''2021 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 96th season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 14th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2021 Super League season|2021 Super League]] and the [[2021 Challenge Cup]].
